process.label: Process
process.title: How we
process.discoveryShort: We learn your story, audience and goals
process.discoveryDetail: We dive into your business to understand what makes it unique. Interviews, market analysis and clear goal setting before writing a single line of code.
process.strategyShort: We design technology that fits your identity
process.strategyDetail: Wireframes, technical architecture and content strategy aligned with your brand. Every design decision serves your story.
process.buildShort: We build with quality, speed and transparency
process.buildDetail: Agile development with weekly deliveries. You follow every step and can give feedback in real time. Clean, tested and documented code.
process.growthShort: We support and optimize as you grow
process.growthDetail: Launch is just the beginning. We monitor performance, optimize conversions and evolve your platform as your business grows.

techstack.techSubtitle: We integrate the best technologies on the market to build fast, secure and scalable solutions for your business.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's build something
contact.name: Name *
contact.fillRequired: Please fill in name and email
contact.successDesc: We'll get back to you soon.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: It depends on complexity, but most websites are delivered in 3-6 weeks. SaaS platforms and chatbots may take 6-12 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline during the Discovery phase.
Our projects start at R$ 4,500 for landing pages. The Growth plan starts at R$ 18,000 and Premium is custom-quoted. We always provide a detailed quote before starting.

items.q: Do you work with businesses outside Portugal?
items.a: Yes! We work remotely with businesses from any location. All communication and project management is done online with weekly video calls.
We offer ongoing maintenance and support plans. We monitor performance, fix issues, and help you evolve your platform as your business grows.

items.q: Can I update the content myself?
items.a: Absolutely. We build with CMS integration so you can update text, images, and products without needing a developer.
We use modern, battle-tested technologies: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Supabase, and more. Our stack is chosen for performance, security, and scalability.

pricing.label: Pricing

plans.name: Premium

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email, phone number, and company details when you fill out our contact form or communicate with us via WhatsApp.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information to respond to your inquiries, provide project quotes, deliver our services, and send relevant updates about your project. We never sell your data to third parties.

sections.heading: Data Storage & Security
sections.content: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. We use trusted cloud providers and follow best practices for data protection.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.content: Our website uses minimal cookies for language preferences and analytics. No tracking cookies are used for advertising purposes.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.content: Under GDPR/LGPD, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at privacy@lipetechnology.com to exercise these rights.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related questions, contact us at privacy@lipetechnology.com or through our website contact form.

sections.heading: Services
sections.content: LIPE Technology provides web development, chatbot creation, SaaS platform development, digital marketing, and maintenance services as described on our website and agreed upon in individual project proposals.

sections.heading: Project Agreements
sections.content: Each project begins with a detailed proposal including scope, timeline, and pricing. Work begins only after written approval and any required initial payment.

sections.heading: Payment Terms
sections.content: Payment schedules are defined per project, typically split into milestones. Standard terms are 50% upfront and 50% upon delivery, unless otherwise agreed.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.content: Upon full payment, all custom code and designs created for your project become your property. We retain the right to showcase the project in our portfolio unless otherwise agreed.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: LIPE Technology's liability is limited to the total amount paid for the specific project. We are not liable for indirect damages, loss of revenue, or third-party service failures.

sections.heading: Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate a project with 30 days written notice. Work completed up to the termination date will be invoiced and delivered.
